description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent sloped roof, likely made of terracotta tiles, and a rectangular footprint. The front facade displays a row of windows beneath a modest overhang, suggesting a sheltered entryway. The rear of the property includes a large, open yard area bordered by low walls, ideal for a garden or recreational space. The side elevations reveal a simple, elongated form with minimal ornamentation and a clear division between the living area and the outdoor space. The roof extends over the main living area, while the back section is flat and open, possibly serving as a patio or utility area. The color palette is dominated by white walls, a reddish-brown roof, and green yard space, giving the bungalow a clean and modern suburban appearance.
description: A single-story bungalow with a sloped reddish-brown roof, white exterior walls, and a large open backyard. The design is simple and modern, with a row of front windows and a spacious yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the row of windows, main entrance, and overhanging roof above the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof, the transition to the flat backyard area, and the long white wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large open yard, flat patio area, and the back of the bungalow with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the elongated white wall, sloped roof, and the expanse of the backyard.
